import api from'./api';const attendanceService={checkIn:()=>api.post('/attendance/check-in'),checkOut:()=>api.post('/attendance/check-out'),getToday:()=>api.get('/attendance/today'),getMyHistory:params=>api.get('/attendance/my-history',{params}),getMyMonthly:(year,month)=>api.get('/attendance/my-monthly',{params:{year,month}}),// Admin / Manager
getAll:params=>api.get('/attendance',{params}),getByEmployee:(userId,params)=>api.get("/attendance/employee/".concat(userId),{params}),getMonthly:(userId,year,month)=>api.get("/attendance/employee/".concat(userId,"/monthly"),{params:{year,month}}),manualEntry:data=>api.post('/attendance/manual',data)};export default attendanceService;
